articles.title: Out of Work Martha Hartford Webb
articles.author: Martha Hartford Webb
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages 419-422, but the article 'Out of Work' by Martha Hartford Webb is listed on page 427 in the table of contents. The images contain 'The Editor Abroad' by Alice Louise Reynolds (pages 418-421) and 'Vitamins' by Jean Cox (page 422), but do not include page 427 where the missing article should be located.
